import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { NavLink, Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../../contexts/AuthContext'; import 'bootstrap/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css'; const ParentLayout = ({ children }) => { const { user, logout } = useAuth(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const [showProfileMenu, setShowProfileMenu] = useState(false); const handleLogout = () => { logout(); navigate('/login'); }; return (
